text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My test score was so bad, my teacher got
steamin' mad!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I gotta do extra lessons if I flunk another one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I'd better get to studying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole ordeal dampens Taiki Shuttle's spirits
for a while.
